basic_details.post_name: Teaching Associate (Contract Basis) in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Teaching Associate (Contract Basis) in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of ANGRAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 40 years for Men, 45 years for Women

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning/ Computer Science, Master's Degree in Artificial Intelligence/ Machine Learning/Computer Science Engineering/ Data Science, Bachelor's Degree of 4/5 years with first division, 3 years teaching/research experience, One research paper in SCI/NAAS rated ≥4.0 Scopus Indexed / Thomson Reuters impact factor Journal, NET qualification (if applicable)
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning/ Computer Science or Master's Degree in Artificial Intelligence/ Machine Learning/Computer Science Engineering/ Data Science with Bachelor's Degree of 4/5 years having first division or equivalent. 3 years teaching/research experience. One SCI/NAAS rated ≥4.0 Scopus Indexed / Thomson Reuters impact factor Journal paper. NET qualification if applicable.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Teaching Associate (Contract Basis) in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (Full-Time)

salary_details.details: For Master's Degree holders: Rs. 61,000/- per month + HRA For Ph.D. holders: Rs. 67,000/- per month + HRA

all_official_links.label: Download ANGRAU Teaching Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Associate position at ANGRAU is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. or Master's Degree in Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning/Computer Science/Data Science, along with a Bachelor's Degree of 4/5 years with first division and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Teaching Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Teaching Associate post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- per month + HRA for Master's Degree holders and Rs. 67,000/- per month + HRA for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Teaching Associate (Contract Basis) in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) in Bapatla, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based position for the Teaching Associate role at ANGRAU.
